channel.title: Earnings on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Earnings on Archive 03

item.title: Magnificent 7: Time to Prove It with Numbers, Not Just Narratives
item.description: The Magnificent 7, back at the center of the market due to AI expectations, must now prove the balance between CAPEX and earnings. Here are the key watchpoints from the perspective of $QQQ and large-cap tech investments.
